exist-pl: Cannot create Potential Link due to the previous link between the same pair of cartridge cases.
notfound-image: Not Available Image, thus Ballistics IQ couldn't compare image.
get-eye: Not found the coordinates of eyes, thus Ballistics IQ couldn't compare image.
helpLandmarkRow2: Use mouse to drag anchor Green, Red in each side.
helpLandmarkRow3: Click button 'Match with' , program will be auto scale, rotate, move image to be match with the other image.
pleaseloadimage: Please wait while the images are loaded for comparison.
wrnuploadbigfile: {0} .The file for uploading must be less than 20MB
dropuploadfile: Drop file here or click to browser file.
generatefaild: Sorry, unrecognized error occurred. Please try again.
remove3dtoReport: Remove 3D image from Possible Match Report
add3dtoReport: Add 3D image to Possible Match Report
notallowreportgd: Cannot perform this action because the information of cartridge cases was not found.
notallowreportpvp: Sorry! This function is not available in comapre Probe with Probe.
explain-landmarks: Manually Alignment using two landmarks (red and green points) on both of the images
explain-local: Identifies 3 Matching Patterns using 3-D and Wireframe Imaging
msgwarnselect1gallery: Please select more than one image to compare image.
msgwarnmore2gallery: Compare Image only apply to 2 selected.
not-detected: Sorry! This function cannot be performed on the current view of these images. Please make them align automatically by using the ‘Auto Align’ button OR manually by using the ‘Landmarks’ button.
ckLocMatReport: Add pattern matching image to Report
autoalignfailed: Sorry! This function cannot be performed on these images. Please use the ‘Landmarks’ button to align manually
slide5imglock: Lock the images to display the Probe and matching Gallery image simultaneously
slide5imglockg: Lock the images to display the 1stGallery and matching 2ndGallery simultaneously
3dnotfoundfile: The image is not suitable for generate 3D model.
confirm-ex: saves pattern to be added to report (Potential Link / Gallery Detail Report)
gotonextpattern-ex: to the next best Automated match
questtion-exitconfirm: Would you like to save changes?
quest-backapply: Would you like to save changes before leaving?
3dbusy: This function is busy. Please click button Generate 3D.
